text: Prime Contract. Subcontractor's proposal or quote is expressly excluded from this Subcontract. Subcontractor represents that he is fully  acquainted  with  all  of  the  physical  conditions  surrounding  the  job  site,  insofar  as  the  same  effects  or  relates  to  the performance of the work required by the subcontract, and has made all necessary investigations essential to a full understanding of any and all difficulties that may be encountered in the performance of the work.
